title: Python & AI Bootcamp
subtitle: Go from absolute coding beginner to building intelligent AI agents.
description: Learn python coding basics and advance towards building AI models, integrating LLM APIs (OpenAI, Gemini), and crafting agentic workflows from scratch.
whatYouWillLearn: Integrate and configure OpenAI, Gemini, and Anthropic APIs
Develop prompt chaining structures for complex operations
requirements: A computer with VS Code installed
targetAudience: Software engineers wanting to build AI applications
Non-technical founders aiming to build AI prototypes
Product managers who need to understand LLM capabilities

seo.title: Python & AI Bootcamp — CourseDock
